repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Refactor DSP to stereo, fix drum preset export, and misc improvements

- Refactor DSP from mono int16 to interleaved stereo int16 (L,R,L,R,...)
- Mono WAV files duplicated to both channels on load
- Support PCM 16-bit, PCM 24-bit, and IEEE float 32-bit input
- WAV output always stereo 16-bit PCM
- Waveform display and zero-crossing use L channel
- Fix DSP export symbol: plugin_init -> move_plugin_init_v2
- Fix build.sh to copy from src/dsp/dsp.so (Docker output path)
- Fix drum preset sampleUri: URL-encode spaces (%20)
- Default auto slice threshold from 5 to 25
- Disable loop playback in slice mode, restore on exit
- Back from record-ready state exits module entirely

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Fix recording race condition and improve recorded file handling

- Add "stopping" state to poll sampler finalization before loading WAV,
  preventing "No waveform data" error from async stop
- Show "SAVING..." screen while waiting for WAV to finalize
- Track recorded files as unsaved (dirty) with discard-on-exit cleanup
- Add timestamp to edit filenames (sample_edit_0306_1423.wav)
- Clean up recording UI header (remove debug VU display)
- Add dirty param support to DSP plugin

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Remap knobs: E4=vertical scale, E5=gain/threshold, E7/E8=twist actions

- E3: zoom only (removed shift+E3 vertical scale)
- E4: vertical scale for all modes (was shift+E3)
- E5: gain/normalize in trim/loop, threshold in slice auto (was E4)
- E7 touch+twist: toggle loop on/off
- E8 touch+twist: snap to zero crossing
- Twist prompts stay visible while knob is touched
- Add snapToZeroCrossing() helper function
- Recording waveform: scrolling write-head visualization
- Recording stop: poll for sampler finalization before loading
- Shift+pad preview: 5% of selection, clamped 0.25s-5s
- Update help.json for new knob layout

repository.name: move-anything-waveform-editor
repository.description: Waveform Editor tool for Move Everything - trim, gain adjust, normalize, and edit WAV files on the Ableton Move

commit.message:
Fix false positives in exploit/scan modules (FW3.7.1)

- Add _discover_params(): crawl real page params before testing
- SQLi: use baseline comparison to filter pre-existing SQL-like text
- SQLi: time-based threshold now requires +4s vs baseline (not raw 2.5s)
- XSS: use unique session marker instead of generic payloads
- XSS: remove DOM sink false positives (innerHTML/eval exist everywhere)
- CMDi: use echo CMDI_CONFIRMED marker, remove generic 'ttl' indicator
- LFI: remove empty indicator payload (matched everything)
- LFI: use specific indicators (root:x:0:0:, HTTP_HOST=)
- vBulletin: require 'vbulletin' in response body (not just 302)
- upload_check: only report 200 with upload form content (not 403)
- sqli_scan: discover real params from page before injecting

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Release WebGate FW3.7

New features:
- SSH backdoor via RCE CVE with Scope Agreement (typed 'I accept')
- TOR routing via bridge (obfs4/webtunnel/snowflake)
- SQLMap interactive dump dialog: pick DB -> table -> dump in GUI
- CVEExploitOfferDialog: auto-prompt when RCE CVE detected after scan
- ScopeAgreementDialog: typed 'I accept' confirmation before exploit
- SSHBackdoorDialog: configure SSH credentials + TOR bridge
- SQLMapDumpDialog: GUI-based DB/table selector with background dump

Improvements:
- Simplified reports: SQL injection Y/N + vulnerable param/payload
- XSStrike output simplified to injection Y/N + vulnerable URL
- Progress bar with gradient, % overlay, bright pulse edge animation
- Logo glitch animation (random interval glitch effect)
- Particle burst animation on scan start
- FW badge in logo canvas
- Scan-line border animation during active scan

Fixes:
- Removed COPY button (caused GUI freeze/lag on Wayland)
- Version strings updated to FW3.7
- LICENSE added (authorized use only)
- README.md fully rewritten with all features documented

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: deep debug — WhatsApp Business, claim race condition, N+1, pool UX

- WhatsApp Business: replaced intent:// with JS openWABusiness() in base.html;
  detects iOS vs Android at runtime — on iOS opens wa.me, on Android uses
  correct intent://send?phone=+NUMBER format (fixes 'Invalid chat link' and
  'Safari cannot open' errors in leads.html x2, dashboard.html, retarget.html)

- claim_leads: wrapped balance-check + lead UPDATE in BEGIN IMMEDIATE transaction
  to eliminate race condition where two users could claim same leads or overdraft wallet

- team route: replaced N per-member queries with single GROUP BY query (N+1 fix)

- lead_pool: fixed can_claim logic — shows 0 when pool empty, handles free leads
  (pool_price=0) correctly instead of dividing by zero or using fallback=50

feat(types): Stage 1 — parameterized type support

Add parameterized type definitions (e.g., Stream(X) ::= [] ; [X | Stream(X)]),
parameterized type references in procedure declarations (e.g., Stream(Integer)?),
and a preprocessing expansion step that converts parameterized types to
monomorphic equivalents before type automaton construction.

Changes:
- type_ast.dart: Add typeParams to TypeDef, typeArgs to TypeRef
- parser.dart: Parse parameterized syntax in type defs and proc decls
- type_conversion.dart: Distinguish uppercase-functor StructTerms as TypeRefs
- param_expansion.dart: New file — expansion preprocessing
- type_checker.dart: Wire expansion into checkModule() pipeline
- 4 new tests (3 positive, 1 negative) — 388/388 pass

commit.message:
feat: Phase 6C.4 — ColBERT MuVera lane in adaptive_search

Wire ISMA_ColBERT multi-vector search as supplementary lane for exact
queries. ColBERT late-interaction catches special-char terms that BM25
word tokenization breaks on (=, /, -, _).

All 5 recall gates now PASS:
- Exact: 0.854 (was 0.821, gate ≥0.850)
- Temporal: 0.852 (gate ≥0.800)
- Conceptual: 0.700 (gate ≥0.700)
- Relational: 0.863 (gate ≥0.400)
- Motif: 0.940

p95 latency regressed to 8687ms (gate ≤5000ms) — needs optimization.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: resources from old planet displayed on new planet after switch

Root cause was in useRealtimeResources: even after resetting prevServerRef,
prevDisplayed still held the old planet's values from state (e.g. 100M).
resolveBase(1000, undefined, 100M) → Math.max(1000, 100M) = 100M.

Fix: use isNewPlanet flag to pass null as prevDisplayed on planet switch,
ensuring resolveBase returns the server value directly for the new planet.

Also guard onResourcesUpdate in App.tsx against stale WebSocket messages
from the old planet overwriting new planet data (checks prev.id against
currentPlanetIdRef before applying the resource merge).

feat(Option): Add per-item Disabled support to SelectInput options (#2496)

- Add `Disabled` property to `Option<T>` class with constructor parameter
- Add fluent `.Disabled()` extension method for `Option<T>`
- Update frontend to support disabled options in all SelectInput variants:
  - Select (dropdown) variant
  - List (checkbox) variant
  - Toggle variant
  - Radio variant
  - MultiSelect variant
- Disabled options appear greyed out and cannot be selected
- Update SelectInput.md documentation with new "Disabled Options" section
- Add SelectInputDisabledOptionsExample to example app

Closes #2361

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Require root cause diagram to recursively expand to terminal causes

Each top-level cause in section 8.2 must now be recursively expanded
to concrete terminal causes (specific I/O ops, CPU work, kernel waits,
SDK/API calls), not stop at vague intermediate levels. Max depth 10.
Terminal cause = directly locatable code/system behavior that cannot
be further decomposed, or remaining duration <5ms.

Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)
via [Happy](https://happy.engineering)

choose between Document Extraction, Compliance Validation, or Both. Extraction
modes show a plugin selector (auto-detect or specific plugin), and compliance
modes require selecting at least one published baseline. Tabs in DocumentViewer

commit.message:
refactor: Change auth UI to professional blue theme

- Replace purple/pink gradient with professional blue gradient (blue-600 to cyan-400)
- Update all accent colors from indigo/purple to blue
- Simplify background pattern for better performance
  - Remove heavy backdrop-blur effect
  - Remove grid pattern animation
  - Use lightweight radial gradient instead
- Remove heavy card animations (fade-in, slide-in)
- Update button gradients to blue-only theme
- Update all hover states and focus rings to blue
- Improve trust and professionalism with blue color scheme
- Based on 2025 UI best practices research

Performance improvements:
- Removed backdrop-blur-sm (GPU intensive)
- Removed animate-in classes (reduce reflows)
- Simplified background patterns
- Faster page load and smoother interactions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

commit.message:
Fix chat scroll staying in container + remove GHL from system prompt

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: heartbeat polish — one-off datetime picker, history tab, enhanced /schedule command

**One-off Datetime Picker (schedules.js)**
- Added Recurring/One-time toggle buttons (line 314)
- Conditional rendering: time+days only for recurring, datetime-local only for one-off
- Updated formDataToScheduleDef() to handle one-off vs recurring payload
- Updated scheduleDefToFormData() to read runOnce/runAt from existing schedules
- Updated scheduleSave() validation: skip time/days for one-off, validate runAt instead

**History Tab (schedules.js)**
- Added _activeSubtab and _historyLog state variables
- Implemented renderHistoryTab() with execution log table (schedule, fired time, action, outcome)
- Added scheduleSetSubtab(name) to switch between Schedules and History tabs
- Added loadHistoryData() to fetch /api/schedules/log
- Outcome icons: ✓ (emerald/success), ✗ (red/error), — (gray/missed)
- Displays catch-up badge for missed executions

**Card Enhancements (schedules.js)**
- One-off schedules display 'Once' badge (amber) instead of days
- One-off display shows formatted datetime (e.g. 'Mar 6, 2:30 PM') instead of time
- For completed one-off tasks (enabled=false), show green '✓ Completed' instead of 'Run now'
- Updated renderScheduleCard() to detect isOneOff and render appropriately

**Enhanced /schedule Command**
- Rewritten .claude/commands/schedule.md with activation-instructions block
- Command now acts as interactive wizard instead of static documentation
- Guides user through: describe task → parse intent → build JSON → POST API → confirm
- Detects recurring vs one-off from natural language keywords
- Auto-generates ID from label, validates future datetime for one-off tasks
- Supports port discovery for Command Center server

**Protocol & Sync Updates**
- Updated ScheduleSyncPayload interface to include optional runOnce and runAt fields
- Updated getScheduleSync() in heartbeat.ts to include runOnce and runAt in sync payload
- Ensures UI can render all schedule attributes correctly on reconnect

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add comprehensive Supabase setup guide

Documentation includes:
- Step-by-step migration instructions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Rewrite InventoryView with full feature set and fixes

- Fix: unit cost now uses formatCurrency() instead of hardcoded $
- Fix: filtering is now fully client-side (single fetch on load, no double filtering)
- Fix: supplier name shown in table column
- Fix: + button pre-sets transaction type to 'purchase', new − button pre-sets 'usage'
- Add: Inventory / Suppliers tab navigation
- Add: 5-card stats bar (Total, In Stock, Low Stock, Out of Stock, Total Value)
- Add: Status filter tab pills (All / In Stock / Low Stock / Out of Stock)
- Add: Sort dropdown (Name A-Z/Z-A, Stock Low/High, Value High, Newest)
- Add: Category as datalist/combobox (suggests existing, allows new)
- Add: Stock History modal — loads transactions from GET /inventory/{id}
- Add: Pagination with ellipsis for inventory items (20/page)
- Add: Supplier management table with edit/delete actions
- Add: Supplier search and pagination
- Add: Export CSV button for filtered inventory
- Add: ConfirmDialog for item and supplier deletes

fix: resolve all mypy errors and update type annotations

- Add type annotations for ws (Worksheet) parameters in xls.py
- Fix pinned_on parameter types to accept frozenset default
- Use walrus operator for None-narrowing in set/dict comprehensions
- Fix missing () on can_work_morning/can_work_evening method calls
- Add Schedule import and type annotation for _print_summary in cli.py
- Suppress yaml import-untyped and structlog no-any-return with inline ignores
- Update uv.lock

commit.message:
feat: v5.07 scope redesign — derive from incoterm, 3-way task mode, config dialog

Redesign scope system: boolean flags → ASSIGNED/TRACKED/IGNORED string modes
derived from incoterm rules. New GET/PATCH /api/v2/shipments/{id}/scope
endpoints, ScopeConfigDialog in Tasks tab (AFU only), scope-aware task
generation. Includes backfill script, terminal selector fixes, BC review
updates, and session handover notes.

shared AdminUserDetailDrawer with the current user's admin ID,
replacing the separate AccountSettingsModal.

repository.name: MeedyaDL
repository.description: A cross platform GUI for gamdl

commit.message:
fix: remove setBackgroundColor calls causing black screen on keyboard launch

Reverts the eager background color application added in f4ee47b6 and
f15184a7. The keyboard frame gets its background through the existing
upstream flow (InputView.onNextLayout → Colors.setBackground), making
these calls unnecessary and harmful — they painted a full-screen black
background that blocked the display.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add Retarget as a lead status with date picker and retarget list integration

- Added 'Retarget' to STATUSES (13th status) in app.py
- Retarget leads now appear in sidebar Retarget List (by status OR call_result tag)
- edit_lead.html: status dropdown includes Retarget; selecting it highlights follow-up date field with a warning alert and smooth scroll
- retarget.html: new 'Retarget Status' filter pill; Tag column shows Retarget badge for status-based entries
- retarget_count query updated to include OR status='Retarget'
- style.css: added .badge.status-Retarget and .status-select.status-Retarget (burnt orange #e65100)
- dashboard.html + admin.html: 13th chart color added (#e65100) for Retarget segment
- base.html: added {% block extra_scripts %} extension point for page-specific JS
